title: Read CSV
description: Import data from a local CSV file into an R data frame.
problemStatement:
Load external data! Write the code to read a file named `data.csv` into a variable named `my_data` using the `read.csv()` function.

**Requirement:** One line of code.
hints: Include the file name in quotes as the first argument.
expectedOutput: A data frame containing the data from the CSV file
